content: Official Supabase documentation installs the Python client with pip install supabase for Python greater than 3.8; PyPI currently exposes supabase 2.31.0 with Requires-Python >=3.9 and official project links to supabase/supabase-py. The v2.31.0 source accepts ClientOptions headers and constructs Authorization plus apiKey headers, enabling per-request caller JWT clients; secret or service-role keys bypass RLS and must remain server-only.
